title: TensorFlow Lite Micro keyword spotting on Cortex-M4
summary: A quantized CNN keyword spotting pipeline using MFCC features and a static tensor arena on an Arm Cortex-M4 class MCU.

constraints.notes: Arena size and audio ring buffer are usually the limiting resources.

title: CMSIS-NN motion classification for IMU streams
summary: A 1D CNN or dense classifier over accelerometer windows with CMSIS-DSP preprocessing and CMSIS-NN int8 inference.

constraints.notes: Shorter windows improve responsiveness but can reduce accuracy.

title: FOMO-style visual detection on memory-constrained MCUs
summary: A small object detection pipeline using reduced-resolution camera frames and fully quantized vision models.

constraints.notes: Frame buffers are often more expensive than model weights.

title: Classical anomaly detection for low-power sensor nodes
summary: Rolling statistics, FFT features, or one-class classifiers used before neural inference on very small MCUs.

constraints.notes: Good first pass when power and memory budgets are tighter than accuracy requirements.
